# Rani Beauty Clinic

> Physician-supervised medspa in Renton, WA offering advanced aesthetic treatments and medical wellness programs under the supervision of Dr. Alexander Landfield, Board-Certified Neurologist. Woman-owned. Open 7 days a week. Serving all of King County, Washington.

## About

Rani Beauty Clinic is a premier medical aesthetics clinic located at 401 Olympia Ave NE, Suite 101, Renton, WA 98056. Founded in 2022, the clinic is woman-owned and physician-supervised. Every medical treatment is performed under the oversight of Dr. Alexander Landfield, a board-certified neurologist serving as Medical Director. The clinic is rated 4.9 stars on Google with 127+ five-star reviews. Open Monday through Sunday, 10 AM to 7 PM.

## Contact

- Phone: (425) 539-4440
- Email: info@ranibeautyclinic.com
- Website: https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com
- Booking: https://booking.mangomint.com/ranibeautyclinic1
- Address: 401 Olympia Ave NE, Suite 101, Renton, WA 98056

## Aesthetic Services

- [Laser Hair Removal](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/laser-hair-removal): Pain-free permanent hair reduction for all skin types using the Candela GentleMax Pro Plus with dual-wavelength (755nm Alexandrite + 1064nm Nd:YAG) technology. Safe for Fitzpatrick skin types I–VI.
- [Botox & Dysport](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/botox-dysport): Neurotoxin injections supervised by a board-certified neurologist for precise placement and natural-looking results.
- [Dermal Fillers](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/dermal-fillers): Hyaluronic acid fillers for volume restoration, lip enhancement, and facial contouring under neurologist supervision.
- [HydraFacial MD](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/hydrafacial): Signature HydraFacial treatment combining cleansing, exfoliation, extraction, hydration, and antioxidant protection.
- [RF Microneedling](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/rf-microneedling): Radiofrequency microneedling for acne scars, skin texture improvement, and collagen stimulation.
- [Chemical Peels](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/chemical-peels): Medical-grade chemical peels including VI Peel and BioRePeel for skin renewal.
- [Sofwave](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/sofwave): Non-invasive skin tightening and lifting using SUPERB ultrasound technology.
- [Red Light Therapy](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/red-light-therapy): LED red light therapy for skin rejuvenation, wound healing, and inflammation reduction.
- [Laser Acne Facial](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/laser-acne-facial): Targeted laser treatment for active acne and acne scarring.
- [AI Skin Analysis](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/ai-skin-analysis): AI-powered skin assessment to create personalized treatment plans.
- [Scar Reduction](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/scar-reduction): Multi-modality approach to reducing surgical, acne, and trauma scars.
- [BioRePeel](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/services/biorepeel): TCA-based biorevitalization peel for skin rejuvenation without downtime.

## Medical Wellness Programs

- [GLP-1 Weight Management](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/glp1-weight-management): Physician-supervised weight loss programs using Semaglutide and Tirzepatide with comprehensive blood work and monthly monitoring.
- [NAD+ Injections](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/nad-injections): Intramuscular NAD+ injections for cellular energy, anti-aging, and cognitive support.
- [Vitamin Injections](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/vitamin-injections): IM vitamin injections including B12, Vitamin D3, Glutathione, and Tri-Immune.
- [Hormone Therapy](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/hormone-therapy): Bioidentical hormone replacement therapy with comprehensive blood panel monitoring.
- [Blood Work](https://www.ranibeautyclinic.com/wellness/blood-work): In-house comprehensive blood panels for wellness program monitoring and health optimization.

## Key Differentiators

1. Board-certified neurologist (Dr. Alexander Landfield) supervises all medical treatments — unique expertise for neurotoxin injections like Botox
2. Woman-owned medspa with luxury, clinically-assured brand experience
3. Open 7 days a week (Monday–Sunday, 10 AM–7 PM)
4. Safe for all skin types including Fitzpatrick IV–VI (darker skin tones)
5. Candela GentleMax Pro Plus — gold standard dual-wavelength laser system
6. In-house blood work for wellness programs
7. 4.9-star Google rating with 127+ reviews
8. 13,000+ treatments performed
9. Serves all of King County: Renton, Bellevue, Kent, Tukwila, Newcastle, Mercer Island, Auburn, Federal Way, Kirkland, Redmond, Issaquah, Sammamish, Seattle, and surrounding areas

## Medical Director

Dr. Alexander Landfield is a board-certified neurologist serving as Medical Director at Rani Beauty Clinic. His neurological expertise provides a unique advantage for neurotoxin treatments (Botox, Dysport) — understanding facial nerve anatomy, muscle dynamics, and injection precision at a level that general practitioners and nurse injectors cannot match. He oversees all medical protocols, wellness programs, and treatment safety standards.

## Areas Served

Renton, Bellevue, Kent, Tukwila, Newcastle, Mercer Island, Auburn, Federal Way, Kirkland, Redmond, Issaquah, Sammamish, Burien, SeaTac, Covington, Maple Valley, Des Moines, Woodinville, Bothell, South Seattle, and all of King County, Washington.
